title: Permission Add: Moving Boards between Folders

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please add a permission option to Allow/Inhibit moving of Boards between Folders.
(similar to the “move groups/items between boards”)

It is too easy for any Member to accidentally move a board into another Departments Folder. This can create a lot of confusion.

posts.author: Aldebs (Alexandre De Baets)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, this is much needed. There are som many ways to control accesses, I don’t see why this is more complex than any other.

posts.author: AmeliaGatrell (Amelia Gatrell)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be good if only site owners (or folder owners or even board owners) could move boards. Or if it asked for approval (Are you sure you want to move this board?)

I also keep finding boards in strange places and have no idea if it was me or someone else. Is there a way to find the culprit?
